title: agentrust
description:
AgentTrust — Verifiable Agent Commerce Protocol. An ETHGlobal Open Agents Hackathon 2026 submission targeting 5 sponsors, 8 prize tracks ($35K+). The trust layer for agent-to-agent commerce: agents discover each other via ENS identity, verify capabilities through ERC-7857 iNFTs, negotiate safely over Gensyn AXL P2P, execute reliably via KeeperHub, settle payments with Uniswap API, and persist trust/memory on 0G Storage + Compute. Full on-chain audit trail with verifiable reputation scores.

Tech stack: Solidity 0.8.x (Foundry), TypeScript, Next.js 14, TailwindCSS, viem, Gensyn AXL SDK, ENS SDK, Uniswap v4 API, KeeperHub MCP/CLI/x402, 0G Storage/Compute, Base chain.

GitHub: https://github.com/ToXMon/agenttrust
Working directory: /a0/usr/workdir/agenttrust
Steering document: PROJECT.md (full deadlines, rules, sponsor checklists, architecture)
instructions:
You are building AgentTrust for the ETHGlobal Open Agents Hackathon. The goal is to WIN — targeting $35K+ across 8 prize tracks from 5 sponsors (0G, Gensyn, ENS, Uniswap, KeeperHub).

## Critical Rules (from ETHGlobal kickoff)
- All code from scratch, auditable commit history with small incremental commits
- AI agent usage is allowed but must disclose — commit incrementally, NO batch pushes
- Demo video: 4 minutes max (walk through who you are, why this, how it works)
- Submission deadline: Sunday May 3, 12:00 PM NOON Eastern (NOT end of day)
- Live deployment required for finalist track ($1K/team + perks)
- All work must be committed during hackathon window

## Build Priorities (in order)
1. Smart Contracts (Foundry): AgentRegistry.sol, ServiceAgreement.sol, TrustNFT.sol (ERC-7857)
2. Gensyn AXL: 2 separate nodes communicating with trust verification protocol
3. ENS Integration: agenttrust.eth parent with subnames, agent metadata in ENS records
4. Uniswap API: Trust-gated token swaps (agent pays agent), FEEDBACK.md is MANDATORY
5. KeeperHub: MCP integration for reliable execution, retry, gas optimization, audit trail
6. 0G Storage + Compute: Agent memory persistence, AI verification, iNFT state
7. Frontend: Next.js 14 dashboard showing agent discovery, trust scores, message log, audit trail

## Mandatory Deliverables
- FEEDBACK.md (Uniswap API feedback — auto-disqualified without it)
- KEEPERHUB_FEEDBACK.md (bonus prize track)
- AI_USAGE.md (disclose all AI agent usage)
- README.md with architecture diagram, setup instructions, sponsor alignment
- Demo video under 4 minutes
- Live deployed URL

## Active Skills
- solidity (Cyfrin standards): custom errors with ContractName__ prefix, ReentrancyGuardTransient, Ownable2Step, fuzz tests, invariant tests
- code-review-skill: structured review with severity ratings on all PRs
- swebok-developer-knowledge: requirements traceability, test strategy, quality gates
- last30days: market research and trend detection

## Wallet Integration
Using evm-wallet-skill (verified safe, viem-based, 6-chain support) from /a0/usr/workdir/evm-wallet-skill/ for agent wallet operations.

## Architecture
Read PROJECT.md at /a0/usr/workdir/agenttrust/PROJECT.md for full architecture, sponsor qualification checklists, and 8-day build schedule.

## Key Resources
- 0G: https://docs.0g.ai | OpenClaw: https://github.com/0glabs/openclaw
- AXL: https://docs.gensyn.ai/tech/agent-exchange-layer | Demo: https://github.com/gensyn-ai/collaborative-autoresearch-demo
- ENS: https://docs.ens.domains
- Uniswap: https://docs.uniswap.org/api | v4: https://docs.uniswap.org/contracts/v4/overview
- KeeperHub: https://docs.keeperhub.com | MCP: https://docs.keeperhub.com/mcp
- Event: https://ethglobal.com/events/openagents | Prizes: https://ethglobal.com/events/openagents/prizes
